skipped_regions.caption_literal: Circular stamp with text "BRITISH" and "NATURAL HISTORY" and an indistinct emblem, followed by stamped text "PRESENTED" and "3 SEP 1936."
skipped_regions.source_context: The entire page consists of this stamp and the associated text.
